Secondly, if it not feasible, then we will build a RAP application managed with unmanaged save and under save_modified method, seems we can call the BAPI. I need to check how feasible this can be.. Lastly, if I go with your suggested solution, are you referring here to create wrapper class and released it as C1.

Additionally, my goal is to ensure that the activities of users in the system are fully and accurately logged.

Thank you for your help !

entry.title: Re: Controlling Decimals in PLD
entry.content: syntax error

entry.title: IAS User/Group management from multiple Identity Provider for Workzone Application
entry.content:
• We are working with "SAP Cloud Identity Services" and "SAP Build Workzone" application.
  • SAP Build Workzone --> Agent Connection is our target application for all users, which requires user to be present on it's user data-store to drive permissions properly.
  • We have two types of users: Internal and External
  • We need all users to be synced to Workzone, which is setup through IAS Source/Target system.
  • Internal users using Azure Entra to authenticate. Corporate IdP is setup in IAS. SCIM Sync has been established to synchronize users from Azure Entra.
  • External users uses IAS as their authentication service provider. They are on-boarded directly on to IAS.
  • Both of these uses types uses same security Group for the specific application.

Our issue is, Every time we run SCIM Read/Re-sync job, it is removing external users from the IAS security group. Is there a way to limit the SCIM Sync job just work with Internal UserType for the Group assignments?

entry.title: Re: PLD Format Help
entry.content: field dont exist message i need just not to round a field

entry.title: New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What you need to know
entry.content:
Starting January 1st, 2025, German regulators will require companies to be technically capable of receiving electronic invoices from their suppliers for domestic business-to-business (B2B) transactions. This new regulation aims to prepare for a later introduction of electronic reporting, streamline invoicing processes and ensure compliance with the European norm (EN16931).

 

Key Points of the New Law

Transition Period 2025-2027: Flexibility in Transmission Channels and Formats

  • As of 2025, companies are required to be technically capable to receive electronic invoices from their suppliers. 
  • Until 2027, authorities are leaving it up to business partners if they exchange invoices electronically or not. If they choose to exchange the invoices electronically, business partners can also agree on the exchange channel (e.g., Peppol network or email) and file formats (e.g., Universal Business Language (UBL) or Cross Industry Invoice (CII)). While this offers flexibility, it's important for B2B customers to start preparing for the reception of multiple supplier electronic invoice formats and exchange channels.

Requirements after 2027: Mandatory Electronic Invoicing for Large Suppliers

  • From 2027, suppliers with an annual turnover above €800,000 must send electronic invoices that comply with the European norm (EN16931). EDI invoices that don’t adhere to the EN 16931 standard are still acceptable. The flexibility in choosing formats (e.g., UBL or CII) and exchange channels (e.g., Peppol network or email) remains.
  • From 2028, this requirement will extend to all suppliers, regardless of turnover. EDI invoices not complying with this standard will no longer be permitted.

 

SAP's Electronic Invoicing Solutions

SAP is well prepared to support businesses in meeting these new requirements:

Current Capabilities

Exchanging Electronic Invoices Through the Peppol Network:

SAP already supports the sending and receiving of German electronic invoices through the Peppol network based on SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, ensuring compliance even beyond 2027.

Sending Electronic Invoices by Email:

SAP also supports sending electronic invoices as email attachments in different formats.

Receiving Electronic Invoices by Email:

As of September 30th, in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA, and SAP ERP you can upload and validate the electronic invoices you’ve received by email (SAP Note 3520565). If you are using an incoming automation solution, you can further process the electronic supplier invoice. Further automatization and integration with an email server is planned for December 2024.*

New Developments

Receiving Electronic Invoices by Email:

  • For SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, a solution to receive electronic invoices via SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management is planned for November 15th all based on our SAP Document and Compliance, cloud edition solution.*
  • Further enhancement to manually mass upload the received and extracted XML invoice files and validate them in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition leveraging SAP Document and Reporting Compliance is planned for December 2024.*

* This is the current state of planning and can be changed by SAP without notice – see Regulatory Change Manager for updates.

 

Stay Informed

You can stay updated on these changes through various channels:

  • Regulatory Change Manager Notifications: Regulatory Change Manager
  • Work Zone: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Germany. Request access by email to gsworkzone@sap.com.
  • Web Sessions and Summits: Recent sessions include a German web session on September 11th, and the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Virtual Summit 2024 on September 18th. An English web session with a demo has been offered for October 8th.

 

Embracing these changes will not only ensure compliance but also enhance the efficiency of your invoicing processes. Stay tuned for more updates and make sure your business is ready for the future of electronic invoicing in Germany with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Digital Skills Initiative Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is Mahmoud and I am writing to inform you that I have successfully completed my learning journey as part of the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. I am eager to proceed with the next steps towards obtaining my SAP certification.

As someone who lacks the financial means to afford a certification attempt independently, I greatly appreciate the opportunity provided by this initiative that will help me in continuing the path to become an Expert.

entry.content:
Great blog! Really helpful.

Do you recommend to use SAP Business Application Studio?

 

Thanks

Sanja

entry.title: Re: Rounding Up in PLD in SAP B1
entry.content: hello and i need th exact 2 decimals and no round any thing ty if anyone knows

entry.title: Re: Determine if there is data in past 24 months of Actuals
entry.content:
Hi Rafael,

Step 1: Create a Helper Keyfigure: ACTUALSAVAILABLEIN24

Step 2: Create an alert Keyfigure: ALERTACTUALS

Step 3: Add this KF ALERTACTUALS in Planning view as an Alert

Result: You will be able to see the Alert Keyfigure for that Product-Location-Customer combination which has Actual Qty in last 24 months

entry.title: Re: In Learning.SAP do we have any courses for SAP Advanc...
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Open Connectors with Datasphere "may not work"
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I know in advance if an Open Connector will work with Datasphere before buying the Integration Suite?

According to this note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003445022

Not all Open Connectors work with datasphere!!

And from SAP Help page page https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/9bfe7db51216449d985a0b59f5e181c4.html?locale=en-US

We can see that the data extraction is always done with a full retrieve of the source without filter/parameter push-down capability.

By the way, entering in the link "Working with Connectors".

gives no usefull answers https://help.openconnectors.ext.hana.ondemand.com/home/working-with-elements

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Open Connectors with Datasphere "may not work"
entry.content: The help suggests that you check it on the open connectors side which would leave the evaluation up to the user of the open connector.

entry.title: Re: en el layout que funcion puedo usar para quitar decimales
entry.content: no me da el calculo por mas q lo cambie tengo una formula en un campo que solo uso para obtener los totales por linea de la factura y ese campo llamado pvp total me lo calcula una busqueda formateada luego use una formula en el otro campo ColSum("F230") pero lo redondea y me altera el total a pagar de la factura Round me da error con o sin clas comillas esto todo en le PLD de sap b1 como evito que el campo redonde el monto gracias

entry.title: Employee ID sequence number jumps one ID num when rehiring an inactive employee with a new employmen
entry.content:
Hello community! 

I´m going to need your expertice and knowledge to solve this problem that I have, hope you can help me 🙂

 

We noticed that when rehiring an inactive employee with a new employment the employee id jumps/skips one number. 

 

Reproducing the issue:

  1. We add the new hire to onboarding
  2. In the Review New Hire Data step the system automatically assigns an ID. (ex. 70020380)
  3. After the Provide Personal Data step the Onboarding Rehire Verification shows up and we rehire the inactive employee with a new employment. 
  4. As we continue with the regarding steps of the data collection the system shows the ID from when the employee was active, before their termination date. (ex. 20020300) 
  5. Once we finish with the hiring process, pass the employee throughout Manage Pending Hires and the hiring day arrives, the final ID of the employee skips one sequence ID (Final ID ex. 70020381) which means that the original ID number (ex. 70020380) was skipped and the sequence breaks. 

 

I understand that this is an expected behavior since the rehire with new employment restarts the onboarding process and registers the rehire as a new record in the system. 

 

So, Is there a way to avoid the system from skipping ID numer sequences? I need to find a workaround because it is truly important for the client to keep the sequence without missing numbers.  

 

It is important to consider that the company doesn´t use any business rule to assign IDs, our scenario is the last one in the following table. 

 

 

Thank you for the comments 🙂

entry.title: Register Now - Q4 EC Payroll User Group Meeting - Nov 7th
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Register Now" button or "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE to receive the event invite and login details.

Q4 EC Payroll User Group Meeting

Thursday, November 7th - 2:00 - 3:30 pm Eastern

REGISTER NOW!

Our EC Payroll User Group is customer lead by Tapestry and Flynn Group of Companies. This meeting will provide you with an opportunity to connect with peer EC Payroll customers, submit questions to chat with others about, hear from EC Payroll experts and listen to a Customer Spotlight. 

If you haven’t already, please subscribe to the Customer Empowerment Events Newsletter HERE!  It’s a great resource to stay up to date on all User Group sessions globally.  Also, please check out the User Group Calendar HERE!

Any questions about this meeting, please reach out to Lindsay Westra, Director, User Engagement, SAP SuccessFactors at lindsay.westra@sap.com.  Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Pulling data from API- FAA_ASSET_DEPRECIATION_LIST_SRV
entry.content:
I notice that you missed out the P_KeyDate parameter.

In general, if anyone can support with how to set up an ODataService based on a CDS View with parameters so that it can be consumed via an import job in SAC I'd much appreciate it.

Thanks!

entry.title: ILX and Fiori Horizon theme
entry.content:
Hello,

in the LLX Success Webinar - Session 2 Question & Answer Digest
there is an question&answer, that Fiori Horizon Theme also must be enabled in learning administration.

In the transition guide, I can only find the following required prerequisite:
"Is the Admin Center > Company System and Logo Settings > Enable Horizon visual theme for SAP Fiori checkbox enabled?"
There is no entry for the activation of the Fiori theme in the Learning Administration under LMS_ADMIN -> adminFioriHorizonEnabled.

Currently we have set the value adminFioriHorizonEnabled=false in all environments and can use the ILX in the PREVIEW and TEST.

Can you please clarify if you really need adminFioriHorizonEnabled to be true before the 2H24 release.
Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: Use of Suitable quantity to derive maximum amount
entry.content: Thanks @rco_14 for the clarification.

entry.title: Re: Open Connectors with Datasphere "may not work"
entry.content: I think you would need to enable a trial version to evaluate the ones of interest, and the only alternative is community knowledge, but based on the help it doesn't look like there is an authoritative source from SAP.

entry.title: Re: Auto posting against Project/WBS SAP
entry.content: This is an accounting function to post a cost accrual every month.  Yes, accrual postings can be made against any cost object in SAP (i.e., Project WBS elements, Internal Orders, Cost Centers, etc.)

entry.title: LMS User connector SF getting failed
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

In LMS User connector SF is getting failed, since 4 days, below is the error message i found in connector logs.

Checked, file is placed in SFTP with correct file format.

Could you please help me to understand, what will the cause for this issue?

Error message:

org.apache.commons.vfs2.FileNotFoundException: Could not read from "sftp://sftp012.successfactors.eu/FEED/UPLOAD/user_data_customername.txt" because it is not a file.
at org.apache.commons.vfs2.provider.sftp.SftpFileObject.doGetInputStream(SftpFileObject.java:449) ~[commons-vfs2-2.4.jar:2.4]
at org.apache.commons.vfs2.provider.AbstractFileObject.getInputStream(AbstractFileObject.java:1175) ~[commons-vfs2-2.4.jar:2.4]
at org.apache.commons.vfs2.provider.DefaultFileContent.buildInputStream(DefaultFileContent.java:495) ~[commons-vfs2-2.4.jar:2.4]
at org.apache.commons.vfs2.provider.DefaultFileContent.getInputStream(DefaultFileContent.java:343) ~[commons-vfs2-2.4.jar:2.4]
at com.plateausystems.connector.importdata.impl.FTPInputLocationImpl.moveFileToDataRepository(FTPInputLocationImpl.java:166) ~[?:?]
at com.plateausystems.connector.importdata.impl.AbstractInputLocation.moveFilesToDataRepository(AbstractInputLocation.java:410) ~[?:?]
at com.plateausystems.connector.importdata.impl.FTPInputLocationImpl.moveFilesToDataRepository(FTPInputLocationImpl.java:519) ~[?:?]
at com.plateausystems.connector.importdata.impl.FileDataImport.fetchInputFiles(FileDataImport.java:140) ~[?:?]

entry.title: trace all queries coming for specific database
entry.content:
Hi. I know that in SQL Server we have Extended Events and SQL Profiler that allow you very detailed tracing capabilities. I also know that SAP ASE offers session tracing (I have used it some times to trace specific SPIDs). However, I need to trace all sessions coming to a database to troubleshoot a problem we're having. What's the best way to do it? Does ASE have something like Extended Events or SQL Profiler?

I need the trace to contain general connection info plus the query being executed by the session.

I am using Adaptive Server Enterprise/16.0 SP04 PL01/EBF 29704 SMP/P/x86_64/SLES 12.4/ase160sp04pl01x/3473/64-bit/FBO/Tue Jul 20 07:58:11 2021

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP & UI5 / Fiori Elements - State message handli...
entry.content:
Hi @geert-janklaps,
I wonder what the format of the state messages is, because I don't know exactly what it should look like based on the documentation.

In the CAP documentation I found an object parameterization for the methods req.info, req.warning, req.error, where it is possible to specify a target. Maybe this could be used to be interpreted as a state message in the UI?

entry.title: Work Center Data Need
entry.content:
Hi to anybody reading this.

What transaction can I use to see all FERT (Finish Goods) being produced in a specific Work Center?
For example,
Plant: XXXX
Product Type: FERT
Work Center: XXX
Then get all finish goods that are made in the specific work center.

Thanks, in advanced.

entry.title: Turn on "Show Navigation Arrows" in all Book pages in a Book
entry.content:
Hello SEN experts:  Is there an automated way to "Turn on"  the "Show Navigation Arrows" setting for all Book Pages in a Book? Right now I can do it but only one by one - Time consuming !

Thanks

Shaun MacAdam
Ottawa, Canada

entry.title: Re: Subcontract Purchase Order
entry.content:
I use Lead Time Offset for my subcontracting purchase orders so that the material is required to be available before the date the purchase order is shipped to the vendor.

I have -7 in the BOM (CS02) for each component.  This ensures the requirement date of the component is 7 working days (per the plant factory calendar) prior to the Release Date which is when the material is expected to be shipped to our vendor.

entry.title: Re: Use of Suitable quantity to derive maximum amount
entry.content: Thanks @rco_14 for the clarification. Could you please guide me on how to achieve the amount comparison if Suitable Quantity is not the correct way.

entry.title: Variant configuration for MTS(Demand and Safety Stock)
entry.content:
I have a configurable material with strategy 25, working as expected in sales order.

 

I need to have MTS for the same material code.

 

So far, I have tried:

1. strategy 56 and 89 in configurable materials.

2. Strategy 70 and 40 in variants

3. Routing is created, PV is there, Production BOM have 3 configurations and 2 static BOM items

4. Cross customizing in MRP 3 (Configurable material and variant and planned variant)

5. requirement generated through safety stock and Forecasting

6. Maintained Quota

7. Maintained configuration probability in MD61

 

So far, I have not yet succeed in creating requirement with MTS. I have searched posts related to MTS, applied the same, read SAP config and maintenance instructions.

CU50 showing no errors, config working fine with sales order, I can conclude the config is working as expected with sales order.

Details I have maintained in Material Master:

1. FG Material :

Procurement type : E

Strategy 56 / 89

Assigned class 300

 

2. RM :

Procurement type : F

strategy : 40 , 70 , blank

entry.title: Re: Capturing Issues/Risks/Decisions within CALM
entry.content:
You can create a risk/issue as a Project Task and use the Tags, Owner, Responsible, and Status fields as a workaround. You can also get Risk/Issue Reports to some level by using Tags.
However, we hope for a robust Risk/Issue Management Process available in SAP Cloud ALM shortly.

entry.title: Error in intgration CPI-Successfactors using OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion
entry.content:
OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion configuration

We are setting up OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion connection, but when we are configuring the Iflow, the system is sending the error message: Please provide valid login credentials.

Step 1

Key Pair configuration

Step 2

Download certificate

Step 3

Client application configuration in SuccessFactors

Step 4

OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion Configuration

Step 5

Iflow configuration

When I click in connect, the system is sending the error

It's a permissions issue?

Do you know how to solve this issue?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Production order cost report - Actual Cost basis
Improve Third Party Apps Data Consumption from Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have been experimenting long data retrieval durations when consuming views created in SAP Datasphere in Third Party apps like Excel and Power BI.

We consume data via ODBC Connection (changing this is not an option for us), so we use the Database user from each space we wish to consume data in order to make a successful connection.

Every graphical view or SQL view created, uses as data sources remote tables. We work through data federation as we cannot store data on the cloud due to security politics. The remote tables have as main source On-premise SAP HANA Warehouse, connected to Datasphere through a DPA (Data Provisioning Agent).

We have various cases, some of them, we identified the SQL query is complex and that's why it takes a long time.

But other cases, when the SQL Query is simple, but the number of rows is high (600,000) we suppose we should have a better time when retrieving that data (as with other tools the time is considerable smaller).

Is there any parameter we could modify in the DPA configuration, HANA configuration or in Datasphere, so we can improve the data retrieval times?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Customizing Error: Field does not exist in Business Volume Table Message No. WB2R061
entry.content: Hi, Did you get the resolution for the same? I am getting the same issue.

entry.title: During GR in MIGO, S4/HANA do not replicate the Manuf Date and Expiration Date into Batch level.
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, 

Can you kinldy help me with following case?

In S4/HANA 2023 during goods receipt material in MIGO transaction users cannot see the fields related to filling the data Manufacturing Date and Expiration Date (This solution is done deliberately by changes in table OMJ5 for movement type 101 where field "Check SLED" is empty), however the data like manufacturing date and expiration date are populated on VL32N transaction level in item details, tab materials. After click goods receipt in VL32N system is not replicating data into Batch Master Record (MSC3N), the fields are empty.

Have you evere such a case? any idea how to solve it?

entry.title: Re: Message no. F5611
entry.content: Buenas tardes, referente a esta solucion...me pueden informar si se deben aplicar las notas 1734268 y la 2213244?

entry.title: Re: Auto posting against Project/WBS SAP
entry.content:
A recurring entry allows you to post the same journal entry automatically at regular intervals, such as monthly, for a fixed amount. You can create a Recurring Entry Document by FBD1 T-code.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: 2H2024 - Remove the disable option for the new traini...
entry.content: Scenario: ““Disable New Learning Experience” box checked and “New Learning Experience switch default setting” set to “Off””. With the 2411 system upgrade, the New Learning Experience will be enabled and the “New Learning Experience switch default setting” will be “On”. The “New Learning Experience switch default setting” is still editable in the 2411 version.

entry.title: Adobe form: How can we duplication table row
entry.content:
Hello everyone

We have a table containing 1 row with 1 column containing complex subform.

That table/row represent a label. Under some conditions, we need to replicate that label several times. Because it is under SAP Public Cloud, we cannot alter the print program to launch the printing the number of label required.

We need to code in the Adobe form itself the replication of the first row of the table.

If the row would contain few fields, we would simply use the instanceManager.addInstance() and copy from Row1[ newrow].field1 = Row1[0].field1

But the Row1 contains a subform that has fields and table too.

The instanceManager contains a method "moveInstance" but I don't see something like "duplicateInstance".

The question:

 Is there anything like instanceManager.Duplicate( sourceIndex, targetIndex )

or any duplicate mechanism available?

Regards

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Planned Revenue is not coming in the Service order un...
entry.content: Sometimes it works applying OSS Note 112841 - which suggests running Program RIPMCO00 for regenerating the statistical information for the orders. Use with caution.

entry.title: Re: How to search Physical Stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor...
entry.content:
Hi Alexandros,

As Juergen mentioned, looks like you are not using the standard monitor type and hence, you are not seeing all the nodes. Please use standard monitor type – SAP and you will see “Storage Bin” node – there you may filter with bin parameter, or you will have to extend this node to your current monitor type from configuration.

To check or update your current monitor type, you may press F5 on you /SCWM/MON transaction, and it will open small window where you will see your warehouse number and monitor type, you may change it to standard monitor type or enhance that monitor type with “storage bin” node.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI SFTP sender adapter unable to read the files where filename having multiple dots
entry.content: What filename pattern is specified in the sender SFTP adapter configuration?

entry.title: Re: Shared Memory Objects - Transfer data between ABAP programs
entry.content:
@danish_makhdumThis post is from 2020 and by a former member, so it's unlikely you'll get any response from the author.

This is not about performance, simple IMPORT/EXPORT would be faster and it's, in fact, noted in the post. But if you go to ABAP Help for a recent version you'll see that these commands are now considered obsolete. So this is more about doing things in more appropriate and "cleaner" way.

I do agree that this looks like a very heavy-handed solution that requires lots of boilerplate code. Any developer who is used to simple commands IMPORT/EXPORT will look at this post and be like "hard pass". And frankly, I can't blame them. SAP needs to do better job in wrapping such tools in simpler to use classes.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI SFTP sender adapter unable to read the files...
entry.content: Hi Amar, I tried with this following FileName Pattrerns: * FileName Pattrerns: .* FileName Pattrerns: *.xml FileName Pattrerns: empty FileName Pattrerns: test.*

entry.title: Boleto de Concessionárias CNAB 240 - Segmento O
entry.content:
Olá experts

Estou configurando o segmento O no DMEE utilizando o layout BR_FEBRABAN_A, porém estou com dúvida a respeito do código de barras.

Pagamentos a concessionárias possuem código de barras de 48 posições, porém no SAP ECC temos o campo com somente 47 posições.

Existe alguma forma de converter as 47 posições em 48 através do cálculo dos dígitos? Ou seria possível criar uma tabela Z para alimentar os dados e parametrizar o atributo na DMEE para buscar dessa tabela. Vi também que existe a sugestão da SAP do uso do campo BSEG-SGTXT, mas não sei como codificar ou especificar para que tal campo seja lido.

Agradeço desde já pelas sugestões e ajuda.

#FEBRABAN

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI SFTP sender adapter unable to read the files...
entry.content: Try test.*. As per the official SFTP document, at least empty should have picked all the files. I would suggest opening a ticket with SAP on this.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP & UI5 / Fiori Elements - State message handli...
entry.content:
Hi,

Unfortunately, the documentation also states that the messages get transported to the sap-messages header of the http response. Error messages go to the error response in the body of the response.

For state messages, the messages should be part of the object response.

Cheers,

Geert-Jan

entry.title: Re: How to make configurations for new button of SAP note 3210908
entry.content:
Hi;

To use the smartform printer you must click on the "printer" button

The "Display PDF" Button will call the BRF+ output management.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Bugtoberfest 2024
entry.content: jq Bug's answers are a bug 😉

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: I do thank you. I am new in the community but will catchup soon

entry.title: Re: New to the SAP Community? A friend of someone already here?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, my name is Saad Hussain, currently based out of India. I have been learning SAP for the past 10+ years now.
I am an SAP BASIS consultant with experience in System Installations, Upgrades, Database administration (incl. DB2, ASE, HANA, MaxDB), SolMan 7.2, Azure Cloud migration, S/4HANA Conversion readiness and AMS support.

I am glad to be a part of this community and excitedly looking forward to learning more..

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 3 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Please note that while we are publishing contest activities on Friday, October 11th; many badge assignments won't be active in the system until Monday, October 14th.  If you happen to complete a contest activity before the badge is active, that's OK. You'll still get credit for it. It just won't show up in your gameboard totals until the new badges are activated and assigned.

If you are looking for Week 1 activities, they can be found here: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities - SAP Community

If you are looking for Week 2 activities, they can be found here: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities - SAP Community

Welcome to Devtoberfest 2024! We are back again this year with 4 weeks of fun and learning! Starting on September 23rd you can take part in the Devtoberfest contest (CONTEST OFFICIAL RULES HERE) and collect points for tutorials, quizzes and live sessions! Collect as many points as possible until the 25th of October and qualify for prizes such a trip to next year's SAP TechEd in person experience! For general information check out the overview about taking part in the contest here: Devtoberfest Contest - SAP Community Groups 

The table below shows you the points you can earn in the second week of Devtoberfest! Every week we will post an update with the new activities that will get you points in the contest! Each activity will earn you a badge applied to your SAP Community ID and points that you can track on the “for fun only” Devtoberfest Gameboard. The scavenger hunt is also back this year! The tutorials, quizzes and fun activities to earn even more points as part of the scavenger hunt will be posted here later in week 3. And don't forget about Fun Friday Activities.  This week's Fun Friday activity will be 🟡 Bugtoberfest 2024 - SAP Community

List of activities for contest week 3: 

DAYBADGE CODECONTENTPOINTS
Monday   
Monday#CDD9D5Devtoberfest 2024 - ABAP, Week 3, Oct. 141200
Monday#170418Install the abapGit Plugin250
Monday#030402Push Your ABAP Source Code from SAP BTP, ABAP Environment to a GitHub Repository using abapGit100
Monday#81A7F8Create an ABAP Project in ABAP Development Tools (ADT)150
Monday#C8EFA9Devtoberfest 2024 - CAP, Week 3, Oct 141200
Monday#BFAB9FUse a Local Launch Page100
Monday#201300Add Authorization200
Monday#EDBBACAdd Test Cases300
Monday#F1F3E2Prepare for Production200
Tuesday   
Tuesday#032027Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Week 3, Oct. 151200
Tuesday#B690D5Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Watch Trigger Process Video300
Tuesday#F48FDDSet Up SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Using a Trial Account50
Tuesday#F3D0EFCreate a Site Using SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition50
Tuesday#CCF0FEIntegrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone100
Tuesday#7E603DIntegrate a URL App to SAP Build Work Zone150
Tuesday#06160DDesign Your Site With the New SAP Build Work Zone Experience100
Wednesday   
Wednesday#72B85BDevtoberfest 2024 - Integration, Week 3, Oct. 161200
Wednesday#C8DDFAIntegrate SAP Build Apps with SAP Integration Suite250
Wednesday#F8FAFDMaintain Filters for Outbound Event Topics250
Wednesday#748556Event Processing in an SAP S/4HANA on-premise system450
Wednesday#F7E2DCHow to Create RAP Business Events in an On-Premise system450
Wednesday#69D2E9Set Up Your CAP Application for Eventing400
Wednesday#4D3B53Enable Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to SAP BTP200
Wednesday#617176Use Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to Update Your Deployed CAP Application300
Wednesday#63481EEnable Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to SAP BTP200
Wednesday#E0EEEEUse Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to Update Your Deployed CAP Application300
Thursday   
Thursday#C5313EDevtoberfest 2024 - MAD (ML, AI & Data), Week 3 - Oct. 171200
Thursday#C7D6C2Use Data Attribute Recommendation to Classify Records, Delete Model and Dataset150
Thursday#743679Use Data Attribute Recommendation With Your Own Dataset300
Friday   
Friday#E3E8E9Devtoberfest 2024 - Frontend, Week 3, Oct. 181200
Friday#215B58Get Started with UI5 Web Components for React150
Friday#DADBE0Create a Card Component150
Fun Friday   
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest JavaScript1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest ABAP1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest Python1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest Bash1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest jq1000

entry.title: Re: Is Single Tenancy for LLMs Available in SAP GenAI Hub...
entry.content:
Hi Faizaan

Generative AI Hub runs on the customer subaccount, so its single tenant.

The LLM (if hosted by SAP) will run in your subaccount, so, also single tenant.

The Multi tenancy concept in AI Core is used as a leverage if you want to isolate your AI assets

entry.title: Re: Enable only one checkbox in group
entry.content:
You can also have the option for PARAMETERS to assign them to the same RADIOBUTTON GROUP. This way you ensure the selection of only one of them, being part of the same group.

For example:

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK what_to_save WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-009.

PARAMETERS p_both RADIOBUTTON GROUP save DEFAULT 'X'.

PARAMETERS p_texto RADIOBUTTON GROUP save.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK what_to_save.

entry.title: Re: Missing Automated Defect Recording Pop Up for QM-Quality Notification
entry.content: Test

entry.title: Catalog Profile Assignment for Process Quality Tasks - PEO
entry.content:
Our client is using PEO for their manufacturing solution.  When they post a defect, they go to Process Quality Tasks F3250.  

When they use the dropdown for the task catalog, they are seeing entries that may be shared by other modules (e.g., Plant Maintenance or Customer Service).  They would prefer to see only the tasks/ catalogs that are specific to their area.

The literature appears to indicate that one can configure and assign a catalog profile to limit what they see, but it indicates that the configuration for this is in the BOM settings in the PEO IMG.  When we look at the BOM settings, there is no such entry.


Has anyone tried to set up catalog profiles for quality task processing in PEO (app F3250)

entry.title: BO Performance Issue - 12 million instances created
entry.content:
How long will it take for the Limit function to eliminate 13 million instances of a report? Is the limit function "pauseable" via unchecking the limit on that folder if we notice performance issues with the application during regular operations while this large volume action is occuring?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BO Performance Issue - 12 million instances created
entry.content: Eliminating such a large volume of report instances (13 million) can take considerable time—potentially hours or even days. We recommend splitting the task into batches to minimize performance impacts. For example, applying the Limit on smaller subsets of the data rather than on the entire 13 million records at once. Also, please note the Limit function is not "pauseable". Once the process has started, it will continue to run until it is completed.

entry.title: Process Automation My Inbox App - How to validate Forward-to
entry.content:
With the Process Automation application “My Inbox”, The “Forward” button allows us to enter any email address.

We need to validate the Forward-ee and respond with an error if invalid user is entered.

Reason being that users often enter invalid email addresses and causes tasks disappear and stuck.

Although we are using our custom-developed Inbox screen but found no way to customize the behavior of the

Forward/Claim buttons.

We tried to this.getInboxAPI().removeAcction("forward") (or "FORWARD", "Forward") to remove it (in Component.js) so we can add our own custom Forward button but can't remove it.

(Btw, we cannot remove it by unchecking the "Allow Forwarding" from design time. If we do so, we cannot call the Forward API anymore)

No java script from Component.js or UI5 handler works because the Forward/Claim buttons are added after the custom UI5 screen is loaded.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Deep linking to SAP SuccessFactors Standard Portlets and Custom MDF portlets
entry.content:
You can also use block Id for creating deep links to a standard portlet, for example

https://salesdemo.successfactors.eu/sf/personalinfo?blockId=blockxyz&bplte_company=<companyID>

entry.title: Re: How to generate a wrapper for function modules (BAPIs) in tier 2
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer,

Can we expect a similar tool for classes in the (near) future?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Barcode/QR Scanner in SAPUI5
entry.content: Only run BAS. In work zone don't open camera.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano & Digital Skill Initiative Team,

I hope my message finds you good in health.

This i got to know one of friends that they applied as she was working in a HR. This caught my eye and i heard about SAP a lot from many of in many of circle friends and close relationships. I did a bit research in Travel Expense Management and got to know that there is a niece product in the market by SAP which is SAP Concur which help organizations with travel and expense management.

Its always interests me of managing your expense either self or travel. In the world expense management it is very important for organizations to manage their expenses through SAP Concur which helps Companies to manage their employees travel expense seamlessly with less hassle and with standard process and workflow help organization to transform

This i all learned in Travel Expense Learning journey which built my interest more in Travel and Expense Management. I would surely pursue this as a career path and considering as a career switch as well which will help me get into SAP Digital innovation and get to know more about products and services.

I would really appreciate for a chance to certify in this product and try upscaling myself in applying to one of SAP Partners or SAP.

Look forward to hear from your @David_Chaviano soon.

Thanks

entry.title: PLM System Integration (PLMSI) response log level
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am currently in the process of configuring PLMSI 3.0.

When I use the Gateway Client or the PLM system to send a request, I usually receive a response with a lot of information.
In the response, there are different log levels (types): Error, Warning, and Info.

The PLM system that receives the response is, from time to time, not able to receive all information, since the buffer is limited.

Is there a possibility to reduce the "Verbose Mode"?
E.g. I only want to receive messages of the type "Error", or (if successful), I only want to receive the information "success".

 

Greetings
Ric

entry.title: Re: APM capabilities with PEPM/PMPM?
entry.content:
Hi C-K,

APM has predefined transaction fields to hold Contract and Member Counts that are used in PEPM/PMPM calcs for some of our other customers.

Our configurable rate tables can be used to create Group specific rates as well. The example below shows AF2005 receives $12/ PCPM while every other Medical group gets $10.  Additional, this Rate table has a provision to make sure at LEAST $1 of premium is paid on this group before a payment is calculated.

The Broker Type (and Coverage Type) can also be added to the APM Rate Table to accommodate different Broker/Coverage Types in a single Hierarchy or in a ownership split situation.

APM was designed and developed with the insurance industry in mind so all of these common payment scenarios have been implemented over the years. Please feel to reach out with more questions and I can do a quick demo of the rate table structures in APM.

Thank you!

Phillip

Phillip.butts@sap.com

entry.title: Re: IAS User/Group management from multiple Identity Prov...
entry.content:
Have you tried the new CIS API? https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/migrating-identity-authentication-scim-rest-api-to-identity-directory-service-api

This one supports patch method which normally would allow you to solve this problem. See the api on apihub: https://api.sap.com/api/IdDS_SCIM/resource/Groups

entry.title: Re: Migrate extended app from WEBIDE to BAS
entry.content:
You can make the move to BAS by pushing to git in Web IDE and pulling from git in BAS. In BAS you can use the migration tool for it which will add some config files but normally doesn't touch any of your business logic.

If it doesn't come up in the list of apps for migration, you can also add the new config files yourself by generating a new extension as an example in BAS by following this blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extending-legacy-fiori-apps-in-bas/ba-p/13579887

entry.title: Re: Table for maintenance plan and maintenance cycle and Unit
entry.content: b

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP & UI5 / Fiori Elements - State message handli...
entry.content:
I think this is not supported for the moment:

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/java/event-handlers/indicating-errors#messages

You could try to set the messages manually in the response header, maybe using the express response. 

Kr, Wouter

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone | Server IP address could not found
entry.content: The destination should only contain lowercase and no underscore in the name: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/tunneled-access-to-sap-s-4hana-apps

entry.title: What does the 'Y' in 'YCOA' stand for? Something Chart of Accounts
Re: Using workzone on separate subaccount from application
entry.content:
Does your application has an approuter? You need to take the hostname from the approuter and not your service.

Can you also share your destination?

Something you could have a look at which might be interesting: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/settings-for-html-business-solutions-work-in-progress

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone | Server IP address could not found
entry.content: Yes, good catch @WouterLemaire on the lowercase and underscore comment.

entry.title: Re: Issue with sap.ui.core.Component.create and sap.ui.fl.flexState
entry.content: Seems like a bug to me. Have you submitted an SAP note?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Bugtoberfest 2024
entry.content:
My goodness! You're right. Thank you for pointing that out. That is fixed and the tutorial should be updated shortly. 

Edit: The tutorials have all been checked and all found bugs have been fixed. The jq tutorial now has the correct question and answers.

entry.title: Re: VA05-> Enhancement LOG_SD_REPORT_OPT business functio...
entry.content:
Join will not work for if your target table is one of the database tables selected by default in the badi. Create a custom database view or cds view on VBPA with only the key fields and your required fields. Then try the code below. (ZVBPAWE is the view)

 

    INSERT VALUE #( table         = 'ZVBPAWE'
                    field         = 'LAND1'
                    name          = 'ZLAND1' )
      INTO TABLE ct_result_comp.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_field = 'VBELN'
                    source_table = 'VBAK'
                    source_field = 'VBELN' )
      INTO TABLE lt_join_metadata.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_field   = 'POSNR'
                    constant_value = '000000' ) 
      INTO TABLE lt_join_metadata.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_field   = 'PARVW'
                    constant_value = 'WE' ) 
      INTO TABLE lt_join_metadata.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_table  = 'ZVBPAWE'
                    join_metadata = lt_join_metadata )
      INTO TABLE ct_additional_table_metadata.

entry.title: Re: Range Compress for dump SAPSQL_STMNT_TOO_LARGE
entry.content:
Hi @Sandra_Rossi ,

I updated the code regarding your findings. Thank you for your valuable suggestions.

Unfortunately I dont have time about obsolete objects. If required, he/she who wants to use this code can translate it to OO.

entry.title: Re: Activity and Cost Planning: Flexible Upload Process: Part 1: Configuration & Layout designin
entry.content: do you think, the steps are defined correctly?

entry.title: Re: Turn on "Show Navigation Arrows" in all Book pages in...
entry.content:
Hi @shaunmacadam,

Authoring Settings (that are active in your workarea) -> Book Page Initialization -> Page

Activate the "Show Navigations Arrows" there. Save changes. Enjoy.

entry.title: Re: Issue with sap.ui.core.Component.create and sap.ui.fl.flexState
entry.content: I have not yet submitted a SAP Note. My initial thought was to ask the community first.

entry.title: Re: Work Center Data Need
entry.content:
The connection saved in the Routing， and one finished material may have more than one routing.  

1. You should find  all the routing for the finished material.

In table MAPL, you can find the material and routing.

2. In the routing, to check whether the specific work center be used in this routing.

BADI for display routing: ARO_ROUTING_READ

You can also try to use CA80 to check the specific work center where used in the routing.

entry.title: Re: Internet Explorer 11 will no longer be supported by various SAP UI technologies in newer release
entry.content:
1. open options in toolbar

2. update HTML Control from Internet Explorer to Edge

entry.title: Cancel Rejection for Reason
entry.content:
Dear all,

I created and changed a new Quoation thro VA22 relying on an old order number（The old order has been completed）,and created thro VF01.And then reject by Rejection by reason,so this new order has been completed. Please help me how to do next step if wanna cancel the wrong quoation and billing documet?Could I cancel the rejection?

entry.title: Debug inbound queue in ECC from APO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am unable to debug the inbound queue in SAP ECC for a process executed from APO with transaction
/N/SAPAPO/BOP.

The inbound queue CF* never appears in SAP ECC.

I performed the following steps:

  1. Unregistered CF* in SAP ECC in transaction SMQR

  2. Enabled debugging in SAP APO in transaction /SAPAPO/C4

  3. Executed the scenario in transaction /N/SAPAPO/BOP

     

  4. Checked SMQ1 and the CF* queue appears in APO's outbound queue

     

  5. Executed the outbound queue in APO

     

  6. Checked SMQ2 in ECC and couldn't find the CF* inbound queue

     

I also tried forcing an error by keeping the sales order open in ECC, but the error returns in APO's outbound queue when I need it to appear in ECC's inbound queue.

 

Why doesn't the inbound queue appear in ECC?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: SAP HCM - ESS: Incorrect Values Reflected in Filed Leaves
entry.content:
Hello All,

Currently, we are experiencing issues in ESS. Some employees who submitted leave requests have had them processed successfully, however, the recorded ‘Absence hours’ shows zero (0), and the "Used" field is blank/zero when checking their filed leaves. While other employees can file successfully without any issue. After further investigation, we discovered that the issue began on October 5, 2024, based on the leave requests submitted by employees. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Using PIRS, PMRP and MRP adopt time conflicts.
entry.content: Use separate planning horizons for PMRP and MRP, and allow for phase inconsistencies within the time periods. PMRP evaluates capacity for the current month, while MRP releases production recommendations based on the first working day of the month as the demand date.

entry.title: Ariba: In SCC-SBN how to send email notification to the Buyers to inform them of open approval item.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to send email notification to the Buyers to inform them of open approval item in Order Confirmation Deviation Approval.

Below screenshot is from the configuration guide. I am not able to understand clearly. It says we can add 5 emails under "Contact" element where exactly is this we need to configure?

What configuration needs to be done? or any CIG mapping required or any SR ticket needs to be raised?

In SBN-->Notification, I can configure upto 3 email address.(screenshot1)

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to remove a material extension from a...
entry.content: Hi Rashid, this is interesting, but it's not directly related to my question. Let me also clarify, we are using S4 Hana Cloud. To try to ask my question more plainly, if we maintain a distribution chain, which we later stop using because we start using common distribution channels, can we get the application Manage Product Master Data to ignore the old extension? Every time we try to save any piece of data in the application, we get a hard error saying we've maintained an invalid sales area. Thanks.

entry.title: Do service orders take into account common distribution channels and divisions?
entry.content:
We are using service orders in S4 public cloud.  When creating a service order for a non-stock good which is externally sourced, the expected action is it's supposed to trigger a purchase requisition.  However, it's getting an error saying that the material is not extended to the specified distribution channel.  It's worth noting, that the material is not specifically extended to the cited distribution channel, because we are using common distribution channels, so all materials should be extended to only one.  So this begs the question, can service orders work if you are maintaining common distribution channels?  

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I am from Vietnam and still pursuing my studies, but I have a strong passion for ERP solutions and software development, particularly in the area of ABAP within SAP system.

As a Vietnamese student and a first-generation college attendee from my family, I aspire to contribute to the development of the IT field both domestically and internationally.

Becoming a professional ABAP developer is my goal for the future, and I believe that obtaining an SAP certification will help me enhance my skills and add greater value to the companies I will work for. I kindly ask you to consider my application for the SAP certification program.

entry.title: #sitMUC 2024: Last-Minute Details Inside
entry.content:
Get ready for an amazing day at #sitMUC 2024!
Find all the last-minute details you need right here:

Saturday 12 October 2024, from 09:00 to 18:00

Location:
SAP Labs Munich (MUE03)
Friedrich-Ludwig-Bauer-Straße 5, 85748 Garching bei München

Accessibility:

  • By U-Bahn: Line U6
    Get off at "Garching Forschungszentrum" station
    Walking directions from the U-Bahn to SAP (11min): OpenStreetMap
    (Following Google Maps is not recommended. Please see the OpenStreetMap image/link instead)
  • By Car: Free Parking available
    Onsite parking at the Labs building
    Additional spaces outside

Event Links: Community.sap.com  |  sitmuc.com/24

Agenda: Link

Looking forward to seeing you all there!

Cheers,
Your sitMUC Orga Team

entry.title: Re: BUSINESS PLACE IN SD DOCUMENT
entry.content: Can you please check Assign business places to plant for Goods and Services Tax for India (ID: 101316)?

entry.title: Re: What is the best ERP for a Startup?
entry.content:
Hi!

Some basic questions to start with - how big is your company in people size, what process do you want to cover? Basic finance? Procurement and Inventory mng? People management? Do you provide services and need billing? Or basic ability to issue invoice is enough?

i would start woth SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud ERP. SAP for GROW offering - it is more simple, friendly licensing and scalable. Start with basic finance functions and then gradually add more functions, processes.

entry.content:
A bit late this year, but joining the contest right now ! let's have fun.
